# NWBrowser.Result.Metadata.none

**Case**

A value indicating that no associated data was discovered on a service.

## Declaration

```swift
case none
```

## Metadata Types

- **NWBrowser.Result.Metadata.bonjour(_:)**: A TXT record associated with a discovered service.
